REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 41/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 26/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Iron Concentration --- HP: 26/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
